course.title: Lesson 16: Mary Had a Little Lamb

segments.text: Lesson 16.

translations.zh-Hans: 第16课。

segments.text: Mary Had a Little Lamb.

translations.zh-Hans: 玛丽有一只小羊羔。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: Was Demetri right to apologize to his neighbor?

translations.zh-Hans: 德米特里向邻居道歉是对的吗？

segments.text: Why not?

translations.zh-Hans: 为什么不对？

segments.text: Mary and her husband Demetri lived in the tiny village of Parachora in southern Greece.

translations.zh-Hans: 玛丽和丈夫德米特里住在希腊南部的小村庄帕拉乔拉。

segments.text: One of Mary's prized possessions was a little white lamb which her husband had given her.

translations.zh-Hans: 玛丽最珍爱的财物之一，是丈夫送给她的一只白色小羊羔。

segments.text: She kept it tied to a tree in a field during the day, and went to fetch it every evening.

translations.zh-Hans: 白天她把小羊拴在田野的一棵树上，每天傍晚再把它牵回来。

segments.text: One evening, however, the lamb was missing.

translations.zh-Hans: 然而一天晚上，小羊不见了。

segments.text: The rope had been cut, so it was obvious that the lamb had been stolen.

translations.zh-Hans: 绳子被割断，显然小羊被偷了。

segments.text: When Demetri came in from the fields, his wife told him what had happened.

translations.zh-Hans: 德米特里从田里回来后，妻子把事情告诉了他。

segments.text: Demetri at once set out to find the thief.

translations.zh-Hans: 德米特里立即出发寻找窃贼。

segments.text: He knew it would not prove difficult in such a small village.

translations.zh-Hans: 他知道在这样一个小村庄里，找到窃贼不会很难。

segments.text: After telling several of his friends about the theft, Demetri found out that his neighbor, Aleko, had suddenly acquired a new lamb.

translations.zh-Hans: 他把失窃的事告诉几个朋友后，得知邻居阿列科突然有了一只新羊羔。

segments.text: Demetri immediately went to Aleko's house and angrily accused him of stealing the lamb.

translations.zh-Hans: 德米特里马上来到阿列科家，愤怒地指责他偷了羊羔。

segments.text: He told him he had better return it or he would call the police.

translations.zh-Hans: 他警告阿列科最好把羊还回来，否则就叫警察。

segments.text: Aleko denied taking it and led Demetri into his backyard.

translations.zh-Hans: 阿列科否认偷羊，并把德米特里领进后院。

segments.text: It was true that he had just bought a lamb, he explained, but his lamb was black.

translations.zh-Hans: 他解释说，自己的确刚买了一只羊羔，但这只羊是黑色的。

segments.text: Ashamed of having acted so rashly, Demetri apologized to Aleko for having accused him.

translations.zh-Hans: 德米特里为自己如此鲁莽而惭愧，便因错误指责阿列科向他道歉。

segments.text: While they were talking, it began to rain, and Demetri stayed in Aleko's house until the rain stopped.

translations.zh-Hans: 两人交谈时下起了雨，德米特里留在阿列科家，直到雨停。

segments.text: When he went outside, half an hour later, he was astonished to find that the little black lamb was almost white.

translations.zh-Hans: 半小时后他走到外面，惊讶地发现那只黑色小羊几乎变成了白色。

segments.text: Its wool, which had been dyed black, had been washed clean by the rain.

translations.zh-Hans: 它被染黑的羊毛已经让雨水冲洗干净了。
